verses.text: And I worshipped the Lord on account of His glory; and I said, Blessed, O Lord, are they who are planted in thy land and those who have a place in thy Paradise;
And they grow by the fruits of the trees. And they have changed from darkness to light.
Behold, all thy servants are fair, who do good works, and turn from wickedness unto thy pleasantness.
And they have turned back the bitterness of the trees from them, when they were planted in thy land;
